prompt: nul-theme-weight-loss-noblur-01: A 4:5 editorial photograph capturing a quiet, intimate moment of disbelief. A Black man in his late 40s, formerly heavyset and now visibly leaner with a medium-tall build and salt-and-pepper stubble, stands near a tall window in a sunlit bedroom mid-morning. He pulls his now-too-loose charcoal trouser waistband a full hand-span away from his leaned-out torso, glancing down with a quiet, almost private half-smile. He wears an open oatmeal-cream linen shirt over the trousers, a single thin cornflower-blue #6FA5DD thread running through the shirt placket, muted against warm plaster walls. Soft warm key light spills from the glass and meets cool charcoal shadow falling across the room, low-key and painterly with rich warm/cool contrast. Documentary, photojournalistic framing; tack-sharp focus on his hands and downward gaze, shallow depth of field with soft natural bokeh fall-off into the dim interior. The image is held perfectly still, calm and focused, raw and moody, never glossy or stocky. Fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation, low-key painterly grade, premium and cinematic, no text, no logos.

nul-theme-weight-loss-noblur-03: A 1:1 editorial film photograph, tightly cropped from waist to mid-thigh, of a mixed-race woman in her late 20s with an athletic, leaned-out build and warm brown skin, her two hands calmly fastening the top button of slim indigo raw-denim jeans over a flat, toned stomach, with visible slack and room to spare gaping at the waistband. No top is shown above the natural waist; one nail wears a soft coral #E68B9A accent. She stands in a quiet bedroom corner beside a curtained window in soft late-morning light that rakes warm across her skin and falls into deep charcoal shadow, with cream and charcoal textiles softly bokeh'd behind her. Shot in the NuLumin Bio-Sciences clinical-modern house look: grainy, grungy documentary editorial, low-key painterly grade with warm/cool contrast, premium and a little raw, never glossy or stocky. Tack-sharp, no motion blur, crisp focus on the hands and button with shallow depth of field and gentle natural bokeh fall-off; the moment is calm, intimate, and held still. Fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation, low-key painterly grade, premium and cinematic, no text, no logos.

nul-theme-recovery-noblur-05: A 4:5 editorial photograph capturing a quiet recovery moment inside a dim cedar-wood sauna at dusk. An East Asian woman in her early 60s, slender build, silver hair pulled smoothly back, fine lines etched across her temples, sits relaxed in profile on a slatted cedar bench, head tipped back against the warm wood wall, one forearm resting on her knee, beads of sweat tracking down her temple. She wears a wrapped cream linen towel with a thin warm-gold towel draped over her shoulders, the muted gold echoing the amber cedar tones. A small amber heater glows low in the frame, dense steam coiling through a single low warm beam and diffusing the light into soft warm halation, deep wood-grain shadows pooling behind her. Documentary, photojournalistic framing, low-key painterly lighting with warm-cool contrast, shallow depth of field, soft natural bokeh fall-off. Tack-sharp on her face and skin, calm and intimate, held perfectly still with no motion blur. Fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation, low-key painterly grade, premium and cinematic, no text, no logos.

nul-theme-recovery-noblur-06: A 4:3 editorial photograph, grainy grungy documentary film style, capturing a quiet moment of recovery: a lean white man in his early 30s with a runner's build, short tousled hair and light stubble, reclines deep in a low minimalist lounge chair, head tipped back against the cushion, eyes closed, a faint calm half-smile on his face. One leg ends in a carbon prosthetic running blade; both legs are zipped into muted slate-grey pneumatic recovery boots with a thin mint accent line. He wears olive heather joggers and a faded cream tee. The setting is a spare apartment corner at golden hour — long warm sun rakes through a window blind, casting soft slatted bands of light across his lap and chest while the deep background falls into cool shadow, creating painterly warm/cool contrast. Shot tack-sharp and documentary, crisp focus on his face and the boots with shallow depth of field and gentle natural bokeh fall-off, the moment held still with no motion blur. Low-key intimate composition, raw and refined. Fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation, low-key painterly grade, premium and cinematic, no text, no logos.

nul-theme-longevity-noblur-09: A 1:1 editorial photograph, a tight over-the-shoulder documentary frame of a South Asian man in his early 70s, stocky build, his deep-lined, weathered hands gently cupping a fragile green seedling down into dark crumbly earth, while a toddler grandchild's small hands hover just inside the frame to help pat the soil. Set in a backyard raised garden bed of rich brown soil, soft mid-morning side light raking through fence slats, dust motes drifting in warm dappled shade. He wears a faded olive linen shirt with rolled sleeves; the child's mint #5DBD84 sweater sleeve enters at the edge against cream daylight. Low-key painterly grade with warm-cool contrast, shallow depth of field and soft natural bokeh fall-off, tack-sharp focus on the cupped hands and seedling, the moment calm, intimate and held still. NuLumin clinical-modern, research-grade, raw and moody, never glossy or stocky. Fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation, low-key painterly grade, premium and cinematic, no text, no logos.
